headline: Stocks Mixed as US Set to Blockade the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.05%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is down -0.39%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +0.21%. Stock indexes are mixed this morning even as crude oil prices surge after President...

headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Best Buy, Bilibili, Constellation Brands, CoreWeave, Nike, Starbucks, T-Mobile, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower this morning after negotiations with Iran failed over the weekend, and President Trump indicated the U.S. will block the Strait of Hormuz. This comes as we get set to start the first-quarter earnings season this week, as the major money-center banks and brokerage firms begin to report results ... headline: Raymond James Downgrades Hewlett Packard to Outperform, Lowers Price Target to $29
summary: Raymond James  analyst Simon Leopold   downgrades Hewlett Packard (NYSE:HPE) from Strong Buy to Outperform and lowers the price target from $30 to $29.
